SEARCH
Package server.dao

Class NotificationDAO

java.lang.Object
server.dao.NotificationDAO
public class NotificationDAO extends Object
Data access object for the notification table.

Follows the project's standard DAO conventions: each method opens a short-lived Connection from DBConnection, runs parameterized statements, and maps rows to NotificationDTO. SQL exceptions are logged and surfaced as a null/false/-1 return rather than being propagated, so callers signal failure through the return value.

The read queries all build on SELECT_BASE, which LEFT JOINs both visitor and user so map(java.sql.ResultSet) can resolve the recipient's contact into NotificationDTO.getSimulatedTarget() (email or phone for a visitor, depending on the channel; username for a staff user, since the user table has no email/phone column).

    Modifier and Type

    Description
    boolean
    ack(int id)
    Acknowledges a notification (marks it read) by stamping acknowledged_at = NOW() — the seen-marker behind the notification center's unread highlight.

    Looks up a single notification by its primary key, with the recipient's contact joined in for NotificationDTO.getSimulatedTarget().

    Inserts a new notification, letting the database assign the auto-increment id and stamp created_at.

    Lists every notification addressed to a staff user, newest first.

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationDAO

      public NotificationDAO()

  • Method Details

    • insert

      public int insert(Long recipientVisitorId, Integer recipientUserId, String channel, String body)
      Inserts a new notification, letting the database assign the auto-increment id and stamp created_at. sent_at/acknowledged_at are left NULL — call markSent(int) once delivered. Exactly one of recipientVisitorId/recipientUserId should be non-null.
      Parameters:
      recipientVisitorId - the recipient visitor's national id, or null for a staff recipient
      recipientUserId - the recipient staff user's id, or null for a visitor recipient
      channel - delivery channel (SIM_EMAIL/SIM_SMS/POPUP)
      body - the message body
      Returns:
      the new auto-generated id, or -1 if the insert fails

    • markSent

      public boolean markSent(int id)
      Marks a notification as delivered by stamping sent_at = NOW().
      Parameters:
      id - the notification to mark
      Returns:
      true if a row was updated, false otherwise

    • ack

      public boolean ack(int id)
      Acknowledges a notification (marks it read) by stamping acknowledged_at = NOW() — the seen-marker behind the notification center's unread highlight. Idempotent at the application level; re-acking simply refreshes the timestamp.
      Parameters:
      id - the notification to acknowledge
      Returns:
      true if a row was updated, false otherwise

    • getById

      public common.dto.NotificationDTO getById(int id)
      Looks up a single notification by its primary key, with the recipient's contact joined in for NotificationDTO.getSimulatedTarget(). Used by NotificationService to build the event payload right after sending.
      Parameters:
      id - the notification identifier to fetch
      Returns:
      the matching NotificationDTO, or null if none matches or the query fails

    • listForVisitor

      public List<common.dto.NotificationDTO> listForVisitor(long visitorId)
      Lists every notification addressed to a visitor, newest first.
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the recipient visitor's national id
      Returns:
      the visitor's notifications (possibly empty); never null

    • listForUser

      public List<common.dto.NotificationDTO> listForUser(int userId)
      Lists every notification addressed to a staff user, newest first.
      Parameters:
      userId - the recipient staff user's id
      Returns:
      the user's notifications (possibly empty); never null
